# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

apiVersion: apps/v1  # For Deployment API v1 version (currently we only support this)  
kind: Deployment   
metadata:      
 name: app-deploy       
 namespace: production     # Namespace of the application, in our case it's 'production', not necessary for now        
spec:          
 replicas: 3            
 selector:     
   matchLabels:           
    deployment_name: myApp          # Selecting pod that have this label selected to be updated by Deployment      
 template:              
     metadata:             
        labels:                  
           deployment_name : myapp         # Label for new Pod created  and associated with the selector.                
      annotations:           
    app/version-number:. ./.verionNumber   // Include version control using git or semantic Versioning                    		// This should be automatically generated by CI / CD tools like Jenkins, Travis etc., not required in this task        		     # 				# Required only for the deployment of a new release and can't be changed after initialization.     
 spec:    // Container specification details here        appName : webApp & imageRepoURL="mywebappimagerepo",memcachedPort = 6379,workerCount= 5   # Required in all versions            	    containers:  - name: my-nodejs AppImage and use existing nodeJs Image RegistryCredentialsID; memorySize : "1Gi"; envFrom[] = { secretKey="mySecret", anotherEnvVariable };ports[?] = 80  
    livenessProbe & readinessProbes for LivenessCheck in order to restart containers not healthy. If container is down/not responding then Kubernetes will try a new deployment  // This can be changed according the requirement if needed                    	     }               ]                }}             ], ports: [ { port : "80", name:"web" , targetPort: $appName, protocol: TCP },{port-name":"memcached","targetPort": memcachePods,"protocol": SCTP}
